title: AuthProvider blanket impl warning doesn't list which methods need mirroring
description: The maintenance comment above the Box<dyn AuthProvider> and Arc<dyn AuthProvider> blanket impls (auth.rs lines 174, 196) says 'every method added must be mirrored here' but doesn't enumerate which methods currently exist (build_client, auth_header). A contributor adding a third method sees the warning but has no checklist — they must manually compare the trait definition with both impls. Fix: add a comment like '// Current methods: build_client, auth_header' to make a missing mirror visible at a glance.
